samples.question: What caused enterprise sales cycles to slow?
samples.answer: Enterprise sales cycles slowed primarily because regulated customers required longer security and procurement reviews.
contexts: Enterprise sales cycles expanded as regulated customers introduced additional security reviews and procurement approvals.
Self-service customer conversion remained stable during the quarter.
samples.ground_truth: Additional security and procurement reviews from regulated customers lengthened enterprise sales cycles.

samples.question: Why did gross margin decline?
samples.answer: Gross margin declined because inference and retrieval infrastructure costs grew faster than revenue.
contexts: Inference and retrieval workloads increased faster than forecast, creating pressure on gross margin.
Revenue increased during the reporting period.
samples.ground_truth: Gross margin declined because inference and retrieval workload costs increased faster than expected.
